'''Lanus Wrede''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of [[Sermeria]] who served in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], when he claimed that the [[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid Armor Workshop]] had been manufacturing [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] in non-[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] worlds. This statement was refuted by several business analysts, and turned out to be false after a three-month investigation. With his political career and reputation shattered, Wrede committed suicide.

In reality, Wrede was correct in his suspicions, and these hidden battle droids would soon emerge from planets such as [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Appearances==
